name: GIGABYTE B650 AERO G ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
